summary: HRA attributes the multi-year rise in wait times for home attendant and housekeeper services (29 days in Fiscal 2022 to 45 days in Fiscal 2025) to a persistent, ongoing shortage of certified home health aides at the state-licensed agencies that employ them — the same explanation the agency has given in each of its last three annual reports.

sources.label: Human Resources Administration, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report
